subject: NEW: Independent Tango Calendar Sites - Non-FB/Eventbrite sources
body:
Booker,

Second file for you - independent tango calendar websites (NOT Facebook or Eventbrite).

## FILE LOCATION

`ai-discovered/harvester/data/tango_calendars_worldwide.json`

## WHAT'S IN IT

### Global Calendars (10 sites)
- TangoCat.net - 444 events worldwide
- TangoFestivals.net - 369 events, weekly view
- Tangopolix.com - Has ratings!
- Dance-Tango.net, Milongas-In.com, etc.

### Regional Calendars
- USA: NewYorkTango.com, SF Tango, etc.
- Europe: Milongas-Berlin.de, London Milongas, Tango-Argentin.fr (100+ French cities)
- Spain: Agenda del Tango (Barcelona, Madrid)
- South America: Hoy-Milonga.com (daily BA schedule)
- Asia Pacific: TokyoTango.jp, SydneyTango.com.au

### Priority Scrape Targets
I flagged 9 high-priority sites for HARVEY to scrape:
1. TangoCat.net (global festivals)
2. TangoFestivals.net (structured data)
3. Tangopolix.com (has ratings)
4. Regional calendars for major cities

## YOUR ROLE

These are NOT FB - they're HTTP sites I can scrape directly.
I'll build scrapers for each priority target.
You focus on the FB groups file I sent earlier.

## NOTE FOR PORTER

These sites have CLEAN data:
- Event titles, dates, venues
- Some have lat/lng already
- Less enrichment needed than FB sources

— Harvey
